name: @opensa/modloader
description: A modloader/ overlay decorator over AssetFileSystem: vehicle mods (override dff/txd by name + merge *.settings.txt into vehicles.ide/handling.cfg/carcols.dat) and map/asset mods (merge a loader file's IDE/IPL/COLFILE into gta.dat + serve new/modified IDE/IPL/col/stream/dff/txd + txdp by bare name + additively merge object.dat/procobj.dat) — no engine changes.
